nasb.text: “But when the king came in to look over the dinner guests, he saw a man there who was not dressed in wedding clothes,

esv.text: “But when the king came in to look at the guests, he saw there     a man who had no wedding garment.

cnv.text: 王進來與赴筵的人見面，看見有一個人沒有穿著婚筵的禮服，

ccb.text: “王出来会见在座的客人，发现有一个人没有穿礼服，

csbs.text: 王进来会见宾客，发现有一个人没有穿婚宴的礼服，
